title: Skizzagers
description: Spin-off of Mumbo's Skillager resource pack.
body:
Mumbo created a resource pack out of Skizz's "eugh" sounds, and it was so hilarious I just had to recreate it. This is my own interpretation, and also contains unique sounds for wandering traders and zombie villagers.

All audio was clipped directly from the hermits' videos and the hermitcraft horns site. This pack works in any modern version of Minecraft, I just couldn't bother to make a zip for every pack format lol.
